properties.name: user.jpa.auditing.enabled
properties.description: Enable the library's JPA auditing (@EnableJpaAuditing) and its AuditorAware. Set to false if the consuming application runs its own JPA auditing or supplies its own AuditorAware.

properties.name: user.registration.facebookEnabled
properties.description: Enable Facebook OAuth2 registration

properties.name: user.registration.googleEnabled
properties.description: Enable Google OAuth2 registration

properties.name: user.registration.keycloakEnabled
properties.description: Enable Keycloak OAuth2 registration

properties.name: user.registration.sendVerificationEmail
properties.description: Send verification email upon registration

properties.name: user.copyrightFirstYear
properties.description: First year for copyright notice

properties.name: user.purgetokens.cron.expression
properties.description: Cron expression for token purge schedule

properties.name: user.security.loginActionURI
properties.description: URI for login form submission

properties.name: user.security.protectedURIs
properties.description: Comma-delimited list of URIs that require authentication

properties.name: user.security.unprotectedURIs
properties.description: Comma-delimited list of URIs that don't require authentication

properties.name: user.security.logoutActionURI
properties.description: URI for logout action

properties.name: user.security.loginPageURI
properties.description: URI for login page

properties.name: user.security.logoutSuccessURI
properties.description: URI to redirect to after successful logout

properties.name: user.security.registrationSuccessURI
properties.description: URI for registration success page

properties.name: user.security.loginSuccessURI
properties.description: URI to redirect to after successful login

properties.name: user.security.registrationNewVerificationURI
properties.description: URI for requesting new verification email

properties.name: user.mail.fromAddress
properties.description: From address for emails sent by the system

properties.name: user.security.failedLoginAttempts
properties.description: Number of allowed failed login attempts before account lockout

properties.name: user.security.updateUserURI
properties.description: URI for user profile update page

properties.name: user.security.forgotPasswordPendingURI
properties.description: URI for forgot password pending page

properties.name: user.security.defaultAction
properties.description: Default security action (allow or deny) for URIs not explicitly configured

properties.name: user.security.registrationURI
properties.description: URI for registration page

properties.name: user.security.disableCSRFURIs
properties.description: Comma-delimited list of URIs that should not be protected by CSRF protection

properties.name: user.security.registrationPendingURI
properties.description: URI for registration pending verification page

properties.name: user.security.forgotPasswordURI
properties.description: URI for forgot password page

properties.name: user.security.forgotPasswordChangeURI
properties.description: URI for password change page after reset

properties.name: user.security.password.enabled
properties.description: Enable/disable password policy enforcement

properties.name: user.security.password.min-length
properties.description: Minimum password length

properties.name: user.security.password.max-length
properties.description: Maximum password length

properties.name: user.security.password.require-uppercase
properties.description: Require at least one uppercase character

properties.name: user.security.password.require-lowercase
properties.description: Require at least one lowercase character

properties.name: user.security.password.require-digit
properties.description: Require at least one digit

properties.name: user.security.password.require-special
properties.description: Require at least one special character

properties.name: user.security.password.special-chars
properties.description: Allowed special characters

properties.name: user.security.password.prevent-common-passwords
properties.description: Prevent use of common passwords (dictionary check)

properties.name: user.security.password.history-count
properties.description: Number of previous passwords to prevent reuse

properties.name: user.security.password.similarity-threshold
properties.description: Percentage of similarity allowed with username/email

properties.name: hibernate.globally_quoted_identifiers
properties.description: Quote all database identifiers

properties.name: spring.thymeleaf.template-loader-path
properties.description: Path for Thymeleaf templates

properties.name: user.audit.logEvents
properties.description: Enable audit event logging

properties.name: user.audit.flushOnWrite
properties.description: Flush audit log on each write

properties.name: user.audit.logFilePath
properties.description: Path for audit log file

properties.name: user.audit.flushRate
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds at which the buffered audit log is flushed to disk when flushOnWrite=false. Smaller values reduce the durability window at a small performance cost.

properties.name: user.audit.maxQueryResults
properties.description: Maximum number of audit events returned from a single query. The query service retains only the most-recent matching events in a bounded ring buffer, bounding memory regardless of file size. Set to 0 or negative to disable the limit (not recommended).

properties.name: user.audit.maxFileSizeMb
properties.description: Maximum size in megabytes of the active audit log file before it is rotated. When exceeded, the active file is renamed to <name>.1 (shifting archives up to maxFiles) and a fresh file is opened. Set to 0 or negative to disable rotation (unbounded growth).

properties.name: user.audit.maxFiles
properties.description: Maximum number of rotated audit log archive files to retain (e.g. user-audit.log.1 .. user-audit.log.5). The oldest archive beyond this count is deleted on rotation.

properties.name: user.security.bcryptStrength
properties.description: BCrypt hash strength (4-31, default 10)

properties.name: user.security.tokenHashSecret
properties.description: Optional secret used to key the at-rest hashing (HMAC-SHA-256) of verification and password-reset tokens. If unset, plain SHA-256 is used. Setting a secret adds defense-in-depth against a database-only compromise.

properties.name: user.security.passwordResetTokenValidityMinutes
properties.description: Lifetime in minutes of a password reset token before it expires. Default 1440 (24 hours).

properties.name: user.registration.verificationTokenValidityMinutes
properties.description: Lifetime in minutes of a registration verification token before it expires. Default 1440 (24 hours).

properties.name: user.security.testHashTime
properties.description: Test BCrypt hash time on startup

properties.name: spring.security.oauth2.enabled
properties.description: Enable OAuth2 authentication

properties.name: spring.devtools.livereload.https
properties.description: Enable HTTPS for Spring DevTools LiveReload

properties.name: user.actuallyDeleteAccount
properties.description: Actually delete user accounts (true) or just disable them (false)

properties.name: user.security.accountLockoutDuration
properties.description: Account lockout duration in minutes

properties.name: user.security.rememberMe.enabled
properties.description: Enable remember-me functionality

properties.name: user.security.rememberMe.key
properties.description: Secret key for remember-me token generation

properties.name: user.security.alwaysUseDefaultTargetUrl
properties.description: Always redirect to default target URL after login

properties.name: user.web.globalUserModelOptIn
properties.description: Add user to model by default (true) or only with annotation (false)
